key_insights.insight: Your body is always working for you, not against you, and trying to save your life in every moment.
key_insights.quote: Like everything the body is always doing for you, not against you. But we continually discredit what it's trying to do and manipulate it, which is why the best thing I can think of is that we're just in an evolutionary mismatch.

key_insights.insight: The concept of 'breakfast being the most important meal' is a myth originating from a cornflakes marketing campaign.
key_insights.quote: It was actually, and I don't mean to diss any companies out there, but it was a tagline that they came up with for cornflakes for Kellogg's cornflakes back in the 1970s. They needed a tagline that made people eat cornflakesin the morning.

key_insights.insight: Men and women should design their professional lives differently: men should design their work around the patriarchal work week, and women should design their work around their menstrual cycle.
key_insights.quote: Monday through Friday, work your fanny off. Saturday, Sunday, take it off. Women, we would design our whole work week around our menstrual cycle.

key_insights.insight: There are six different types of fasting which have different outcomes and benefits.
key_insights.quote: In your book and throughout your work, you describe these six different types of fasting...What are the six types of fasting? And tell me what the differenceis in outcome and benefit?

key_insights.insight: Most people are low in vitamin D because sunlight and sardines are the most prominent food source for it, but many spend most of their time indoors and don't eat sardines.
key_insights.quote: If your vitamin D is under 30, you are in a critically depressed immune state...and vitamin d comes from sunlight doesn't it sunlight and uh sardinessardines it's the food sources are really bad this iswhy everybody's low in it the food sources are it's sardines it's like really fatty fishesand sunlight and we spend most of our time indoors that's right

key_insights.insight: When going through chemotherapy, fasting for three days can help reboot the white blood cells of the immune system.
key_insights.quote: After three daysof fasting, the white blood cells in our system actually reboot themselves. So what they do isall old white blood cells are sloughed away and new white blood cells emerge.

key_insights.insight: Women are more likely to be affected by autoimmune diseases because many factors affect hormones.
key_insights.quote: It's happening more to women,largely because, well, this could go dark real fast, but largely because we have so many influences that areaffecting our hormones.

actionable_advice.advice: Compress your eating window into a 10-hour eating window, leaving 14 hours for fasting.
actionable_advice.how_to: Choose a 10-hour window that fits your lifestyle and stick to it consistently.

actionable_advice.advice: If you have a conflict you want to resolve with your partner, do it between day two and day 12 of her cycle.
actionable_advice.how_to: Track your partner's menstrual cycle and plan important conversations for when she is building estrogen.

actionable_advice.advice: If a woman is having a bad day, ask her what day of her cycle it is.
actionable_advice.how_to: Be nice and attentive to her needs.

actionable_advice.advice: Get a monitor where you can see and scan your glucose levels.
actionable_advice.how_to: Continuously monitor your glucose levels to find out what foods and combinations work for you and avoid glucose spikes.

actionable_advice.advice: Men, supplement with zinc. Women, supplement with magnesium.
actionable_advice.how_to: Take zinc and magnesium supplements respectively to make testosterone and every single hormone in your body.
Supplement to maintain your vitamin D levels over 30, but for hormonal health maintain levels in about 60-70.

memorable_stories: Dr. Mindy had an Achilles tendon injury, nothing was helping it so she threw a five-day water fast at it. On the fourth day, she felt this buzz in my Achilles tendon and the pain went away and never came back.
contrarian_claims: The traditional 9-5, Monday-Friday patriarchal work week is actually well-designed for men, as they have a testosterone cycle every 24 hours.
The notion that women are perishing more than men in modern society. This is connected to hormone imbalance and stress management differences.
The messaging is like you did something wrong. You have a genetic profile that you're doomed to have a disastrous outcome. And everything is exogenously blamed at us.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Miracle Doctor: EVERYONE should start Fasting right now! (NEW SCIENCE) Dr. Mindy Pelz
